revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月11日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 11일]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月十一]][[zh:二月十一]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 11|qq=February 11}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月十一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 11일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 11''' is the 11th day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}. == Events == * {{ill|Nin'an|ja|仁安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nin'an|1=Nin'an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18925702}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1167|en|1167|qid=Q19678|lt=1167|1=1167}} {{ill|March 4|en|March 4|qid=Q2396|lt=March 4|1=March 4}}) – {{ill|Taira no Kiyomori|en|Taira no Kiyomori|qid=Q281833|lt=Taira no Kiyomori|1=Taira no Kiyomori}} assumed the office of {{ill|Minister (government)|en|Minister (government)|qid=Q83307|lt=Daijō-daijin|1=Minister (government)}} in one fell swoop without going through the positions of Left and Right Minister, thereby establishing the Taira clan regime. * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1694|en|1694|qid=Q7694|lt=1694|1=1694}} {{ill|March 6|en|March 6|qid=Q2399|lt=March 6|1=March 6}}) – The event known as the {{ill|Takada Bamba Duel|ja|高田馬場の決闘|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takada Bamba Duel|1=Duel at Takadanobaba|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11672248}} took place. * {{ill|Culture|en|Culture|qid=Q11042|lt=Bunka|1=Culture}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1804|en|1804|qid=Q6894|lt=1804|1=1804}} {{ill|March 22|en|March 22|qid=Q2435|lt=March 22|1=March 22}}) – For the issuance of the historical edict {{ill|Kōshi Kakurei|ja|鐘匱の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshi Kakurei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135490496}}, the era name was changed from {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|qid=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa|1=Kyōwa}} to {{ill|Culture|en|Culture|qid=Q11042|lt=Bunka|1=Culture}}. * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1862|en|1862|qid=Q7698|lt=1862|1=1862}} {{ill|March 11|en|March 11|qid=Q2398|lt=March 11|1=March 11}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate held a wedding ceremony at Edo Castle for the Shōgun, {{ill|Tokugawa Iemochi|en|Tokugawa Iemochi|qid=Q348466|lt=Tokugawa Iemochi|1=Tokugawa Iemochi}}, and his imperial consort, {{ill|Chikako, Princess Kazu|en|Chikako, Princess Kazu|qid=Q907048|lt=Waminya Ochi Naishinnō|1=Chikako, Princess Kazu}}. == Births == * {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku|1=Genroku}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1694|en|1694|qid=Q7694|lt=1694|1=1694}} {{ill|March 6|en|March 6|qid=Q2399|lt=March 6|1=March 6}}) – {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya Masahito Shinnō|ja|有栖川宮正仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Arisugawa-no-miya Masahito Shinnō|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Tadahito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11516504}}, the 4th head of the Arisugawa-no-miya (died {{ill|1716|en|1716|qid=Q6892|lt=1716|1=1716}}). == Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|10|2|12|1|11|3|2|0211|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月十一]]
{{translated page|ja|2月11日 (旧暦)|version=66809341|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:2 nguŏk 11 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:February 11 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 2월 11일]] [[ja:2月11日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月十一]]
[[ar:February 11 (Lunisolar)]]
<!--「[[Raiden Weimon]]」には「2月21日」と記載--><!-- Add any commemorations if needed -->
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月十一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 11 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月十一]] {{wikidata link|Q839324}} [[Category:Days 11 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar February]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Pages with deleted QID in ill template]]
